message:
fix(crew): clone default_branch instead of remote HEAD

gt crew add used git.Clone() which checks out the remote's HEAD branch.
When a rig has default_branch configured differently (e.g. "gastown" vs
"main"), crew workspaces silently landed on the wrong branch.

Use CloneBranch(defaultBranch) so the initial clone targets the rig's
configured default_branch directly. Fallback cascade prioritizes
branch-targeting (CloneBranch) before reference-only (CloneWithReference),
and falls back to plain Clone for empty/new repos.

Closes #2272

Co-Authored-By: Krystian Gebis <l0g1x@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
